mapper.sql: id, project_id, template_id, file_id, task_id, status, issues_json, result_json, error_message, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: select from review_record where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update review_record set status = 'PROCESSING', error_message = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0

update review_record set status = 'COMPLETED', issues_json = #{issuesJson}, result_json = #{resultJson}, error_message = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status = 'PROCESSING' and deleted = 0
update review_record set status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0
